message.content:
@startuml
actor Admin

participant AddEventPage
participant AddEventFormContainer
participant AddClassPopupContainer
participant ClassForm
participant "ClassService (Frontend)" as ClassServiceFE
participant "ShiftService (Frontend)" as ShiftServiceFE
participant Router
participant ClassHTTPTransport
participant ClassEndpoint
participant ClassService
participant ClassCommand
participant ClassQuery
participant TransactionGRPCTransport
participant "StorageGRPC Transport" as StorageGRPCTransport
participant MaterialService
participant NatsStreaming

Admin -> AddEventPage : Click "Attach New Class" Button
AddEventPage -> AddEventFormContainer : attachClass()
AddEventPage -> AddEventFormContainer : attach
Admin -> AddEventPage : Render "Add Class Popup" Container
AddEventFormContainer -> AddClassPopupContainer : render
AddClassPopupContainer --> AddEventFormContainer : rendered

Admin -> AddEventPage : choose date
AddClassPopupContainer -> ClassForm : handleDateChange(value)
ClassForm -> ShiftServiceFE : fetchAvailableShifts(date)
ShiftServiceFE --> ClassForm : shifts
ClassForm --> AddClassPopupContainer : form data

Admin -> AddEventPage : form data
Admin -> AddEventPage : choose shift
AddClassPopupContainer -> ClassForm : handleShiftChange()
ClassForm -> ShiftServiceFE : fetchAvailableShifts(date, [shift])
ShiftServiceFE --> ClassForm : rooms
ClassForm --> AddClassPopupContainer : form data

Admin -> AddEventPage : form data
Admin -> AddEventPage : Fill Form
AddEventPage -> AddClassPopupContainer : form data
Admin -> AddEventPage : form data
Admin -> AddEventPage : Click "Create Class" Button
AddClassPopupContainer -> ClassForm : handleClassFormSubmitted()
ClassForm --> AddClassPopupContainer
AddClassPopupContainer -> ClassServiceFE : bookingClass(payload)
ClassServiceFE -> Router : route("GET", "/v2/booking")
Router -> ClassHTTPTransport : BookingClass(ClassService, [ServerOption])
ClassHTTPTransport -> ClassEndpoint : BookingClass(ClassService, withPaginated)
ClassEndpoint -> ClassService : Create(context, params)
ClassService -> ClassCommand : Validate()
ClassCommand --> ClassService

alt [Data Valid]
ClassService -> TransactionGRPCTransport : IsValidTransaction(ProtoBuffer)
TransactionGRPCTransport --> ClassService : ProtoResponse

alt [Is Valid Transaction]
ClassService -> ClassCommand : class := ClassModel()
ClassCommand --> ClassService
ClassService -> ClassCommand : Create(context, class)
ClassCommand --> ClassService : uuid

opt [has materials]
ClassService -> StorageGRPCTransport : CommitFile(context, ProtoBuffer)
StorageGRPCTransport --> ClassService : link
ClassService -> StorageGRPCTransport : Create(context, payload)
StorageGRPCTransport --> ClassService : isCreated
end

ClassService -> ClassQuery : Find(context, [SliceConditions])
ClassQuery --> ClassService : classes
ClassService -> NatsStreaming : publishClassCreated(context, data)
NatsStreaming --> ClassService : published

ClassService --> ClassEndpoint : BadRequest
ClassEndpoint --> ClassHTTPTransport : BadRequest
ClassHTTPTransport --> Router : BadRequest
Router --> ClassServiceFE : BadRequest
ClassServiceFE --> AddClassPopupContainer : BadRequest
AddClassPopupContainer --> AddEventFormContainer : BadRequest
AddEventFormContainer --> Admin : BadRequest
end

end

ClassService --> ClassEndpoint : UnprocessableEntity
ClassEndpoint --> ClassHTTPTransport : UnprocessableEntity
ClassHTTPTransport --> Router : UnprocessableEntity
Router --> ClassServiceFE : UnprocessableEntity
ClassServiceFE --> AddClassPopupContainer : UnprocessableEntity
AddClassPopupContainer --> AddEventFormContainer : UnprocessableEntity
AddEventFormContainer --> Admin : UnprocessableEntity

ClassService -> ClassCommand : class
ClassCommand --> ClassService : response := Response(class, nil)
ClassService --> ClassEndpoint : response
ClassEndpoint --> ClassHTTPTransport : response
ClassHTTPTransport --> Router : response
Router --> ClassServiceFE : response
ClassServiceFE --> AddClassPopupContainer : response
AddClassPopupContainer --> AddEventFormContainer : response
AddEventFormContainer --> Admin : response

@enduml
